name: VaultFront
currentFocus: Session 71 audit/implement complete: Studio protocol helper regression coverage shipped, generated Obelisk passport stubs quarantined until origin registration, and startup/compact/secrets probes verified.
nextMilestone: Register the Obelisk relying-party production origin before wiring login, then run the operatorNext-guided rivalry/rematch alpha gate and observe real checkout/supporter telemetry before clearing the revenue warning.
entropyMethod: coherence-variance + decision-reversal count + intent-drift; all three at minimum — no off-axis features, 0 decision reversals in 5 sessions, 100% intent achievement, SIL coherence 100/100

testingSurfaces.label: Unit and server regression
testingSurfaces.purpose: Vitest core/client suite plus focused server tests. All 94 client/core test files (655 tests) plus 10 server files (30 tests) pass as of Session 71.

testingSurfaces.label: Production build
testingSurfaces.purpose: TypeScript no-emit plus production Vite bundle.

testingSurfaces.label: E2E smoke
testingSurfaces.purpose: Playwright homepage, settings, manifest, and solo-flow smoke. CI-style serial run passes; local parallel run is flaky.

testingSurfaces.label: Local game server
testingSurfaces.purpose: Client and worker stack for manual match, tournament, and HUD checks.
